name: Carried Interest Capital Interest Exception

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must contribute capital to the partnership or be taxed under section 83 upon receipt/vesting of the interest to qualify for the exception to the 3-year rule.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes partnership interests from the 3-year holding period requirement for long-term capital gain treatment if the interest is a 'capital interest' commensurate with contributed capital.
